title: Panel shell — shared popup keys (hotspot.json › popup)
description: Base fields read by buildShell() for every hotspot, regardless of interaction type. Gadget-specific fields are defined in each gadget's own schema.

interaction.description: Gadget name. Must match one of the available gadget schema ids: "numpad", "toggle-bank", "info".

title.description: Panel heading shown in the title bar and content area.

badge.description: Optional small category label shown below the title bar, e.g. "Puzzle · Infrastructure".
